revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初三]][[zh:七月初三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初三]][[zh:七月初三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初三]][[zh:七月初三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初三]][[zh:七月初三]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 3|qq=July 3}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Emperor Annei|en|Emperor Annei|qid=Q313345|lt=Emperor Annei|1=Emperor Annei}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 31|en|August 31|qid=Q2830|lt=August 31|1=August 31}} , [[:en:549 BCE|549 BCE]] ) – {{ill|Emperor Annei|en|Emperor Annei|qid=Q313345|lt=Emperor Annei|1=Emperor Annei}} , the 3rd emperor of Japan, ascended to the throne. * Year 16 of {{ill|Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko|2=ja|3=推古天皇|ja|Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko|2=ja|3=推古天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Suiko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q298057}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 1|en|August 1|qid=Q2788|lt=August 1|1=August 1}} , {{ill|607|en|607|qid=Q31823|lt=607|1=607}} ) – The second {{ill|Japanese missions to Sui China|en|Japanese missions to Sui China|qid=Q15401774|lt=Kentōshi|1=Japanese missions to Sui China}} mission departed for {{ill|Sui dynasty|en|Sui dynasty|qid=Q7405|lt=Sui dynasty|1=Sui dynasty}} . {{ill|Ono no Imoko|en|Ono no Imoko|qid=Q1284072|lt=Ono no Imoko|1=Ono no Imoko}} carried a diplomatic letter from the {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} to Emperor {{ill|Emperor Yang of Sui|en|Emperor Yang of Sui|qid=Q7419|lt=Yang of Sui|1=Emperor Yang of Sui}} , beginning with the phrase "The Emperor of the land where the sun rises...". * Year 9 of {{ill|Kanpyō (era)|en|Kanpyō (era)|qid=Q1346292|lt=Kanpyō|1=Kanpyō (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 4|en|August 4|qid=Q2784|lt=August 4|1=August 4}} , {{ill|897|en|897|qid=Q30468|lt=897|1=897}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Uda|en|Emperor Uda|qid=Q349267|lt=Emperor Uda|1=Emperor Uda}} abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|qid=Q329753|lt=Emperor Daigo|1=Emperor Daigo}} , who ascended as the 60th emperor. * Year 18 of {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|qid=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 27|en|July 27|qid=Q2719|lt=July 27|1=July 27}} , {{ill|1549|en|1549|qid=Q6554|lt=1549|1=1549}} ) – {{ill|Francis Xavier|en|Francis Xavier|qid=Q163900|lt=Francis Xavier|1=Francis Xavier}} arrived in Kagoshima on a ship, having landed on {{ill|July 22|en|July 22|qid=Q2725|lt=July 22 (lunar calendar)|1=July 22}} . * Year 6 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 6|en|August 6|qid=Q2787|lt=August 6|1=August 6}} , {{ill|1578|en|1578|qid=Q6707|lt=1578|1=1578}} ) – The {{ill|Mōri clan|en|Mōri clan|qid=Q914637|lt=Mōri clan|1=Mōri clan}} defeated the {{ill|Amago clan|en|Amago clan|qid=Q2575609|lt=Amago clan|1=Amago clan}} at {{ill|Kōzuki Castle|ja|上月城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzuki Castle|1=Kōzuki Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8012417}} , marking the end of the Amago. * Year 7 of {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}} , {{ill|1722|en|1722|qid=Q6918|lt=1722|1=1722}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|ja|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yoshimune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q319664}} implemented the {{ill|Jōmai System|ja|上米の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōmai System|1=Shōbei no Sei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4057193}} , requiring {{ill|daimyō|ja|諸大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/daimyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大名|1=Daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q61982}} to contribute rice in exchange for a reduction of their mandatory residence period in Edo to six months. The system was abolished in 1730.
== Births == * Year 6 of {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 8|en|August 8|qid=Q2780|lt=August 8|1=August 8}} , {{ill|1709|en|1709|qid=Q6857|lt=1709|1=1709}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsugu|en|Tokugawa Ietsugu|qid=Q366722|lt=Tokugawa Ietsugu|1=Tokugawa Ietsugu}} , 7th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. {{ill|1716|en|1716|qid=Q6892|lt=1716|1=1716}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 6 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 6|en|August 6|qid=Q2787|lt=August 6|1=August 6}} , {{ill|1578|en|1578|qid=Q6707|lt=1578|1=1578}} ) – {{ill|Amago Katsuhisa|en|Amago Katsuhisa|qid=Q837431|lt=Amago Katsuhisa|1=Amago Katsuhisa}} , samurai (b. {{ill|1553|en|1553|qid=Q6568|lt=1553|1=1553}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenna|en|Tenna|qid=Q1145289|lt=Tenna|1=Tenna}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 24|en|August 24|qid=Q2825|lt=August 24|1=August 24}} , {{ill|1683|en|1683|qid=Q7651|lt=1683|1=1683}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Tadateru|en|Matsudaira Tadateru|qid=Q837867|lt=Matsudaira Tadatoki|1=Matsudaira Tadateru}} , former lord of {{ill|Takada Domain (Echigo)|ja|越後高田藩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takada Domain (Echigo)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高田藩|1=Takada Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q839422}} , and the sixth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} (b. {{ill|1592|en|1592|qid=Q6769|lt=1592|1=1592}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}} , {{ill|1806|en|1806|qid=Q6903|lt=1806|1=1806}} ) – {{ill|Shizuki Tadao|en|Shizuki Tadao|qid=Q6531390|lt=Shidzuki Tadao|1=Shizuki Tadao}} , {{ill|Rangaku|en|Rangaku|qid=Q877637|lt=Rangaku|1=Rangaku}} scholar and interpreter (b. {{ill|1760|en|1760|qid=Q7646|lt=1760|1=1760}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|2|7|4|6|3|8|7|0703|qq=}}
